name: Fridge
description: This family of four has recently secured their rental flat after spending two years in transitional shelter, marking an important step toward stability and rebuilding their lives. As they settle into their new home, they are in urgent need of essential household appliances, including a refrigerator. The mother, who is the sole breadwinner earning slightly over $2,000 a month, is doing her best to provide for her children, but her income is stretched across daily expenses, school needs, and household bills. A refrigerator is vital for safe food storage, meal preparation, and reducing daily food costs, allowing the family to buy groceries in bulk and minimise food wastage. A donated fridge would significantly ease their financial strain and support their transition into a stable and dignified living environment.

passiton.name: Electrolux bar fridge

The family is facing financial constraints and is currently in the midst of searching for stable employment. The family has a school-going child.

name: L shape sofa
description: The family is seeking an L‑shaped sofa to replace their current sofa, which is damaged and no longer usable. As a family of five living in a compact 2‑room rental flat, they do not have sufficient seating or a proper resting area. This is particularly important for the mother, who has chronic back pain and significant caregiver fatigue, and requires appropriate support to rest safely. Due to financial difficulties—including reduced SSO assistance, unstable household income, medical costs, and tight monthly budgets—the family is unable to purchase a replacement. Donor to kindly cover transport arrangement and delivery cost please thank you!

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Ang Mo Kio 230
contact.name: Tasya Puspita Maulany

passiton.name: L shape sofa
passiton.description:
Sofa is fabric. Sofa covers are removable. Washed in January 2026. Cushions are spring. 
Dimensions: 76 cm (w) on the arm rest side, 145 cm (w) on the L-shape side, 188cm (L) 85 cm (H)

name: Mattress
description:
Request for Super Single Firm Mattress (Donation)

Seeking donation of a super single firm mattress for a low‑income senior staying with her spouse in a studio rental flat. Her current foam mattress has sunk and causes her to slide during sleep. She requires a firmer mattress for better support and safety.

Bedframe is super single size. Senior uses a walking frame when getting off the bed.

Any donation in good condition is greatly appreciated. Thank you for your kindness

name: Bicycle
description: Low-income family with a school-going child requires a bicycle for daily transport to and from school. Currently relying on public transport, which incurs ongoing costs that are difficult to sustain. A bicycle will help reduce transport expenses and support the family’s financial stability. Parent is working delivery jobs with irregular income, while the other caregiver is actively seeking full-time employment. Bicycle will be used regularly for school commute and essential errands.
